name: Frye (Splatoon 3)
description: Frye is one of the three main members of the idol group called "Deep cut" alongside her is a blue octoling named Shiver, and big man a grey MANta rey. They preform every now and then in things called splatfests to determine who's the most voted idol. Frye has had only 2 splatfest wins throughout the entire length of the game.
creator: Raiden_Rippee
